prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your content creation business forward
items: Define your content niche and identify 3 specific subtopics you want to focus on
Research and analyze 5 successful content creators in your chosen niche to understand their strategies
Create a content audit by documenting your existing skills, experience, and knowledge areas
Set up analytics tracking on all your current social media accounts and content platforms
Establish your content creation workspace and invest in essential equipment for your niche
Define your target audience by creating 3 detailed buyer personas for your ideal clients
